directive.name: Human Capability Infrastructure
directive.mission: Build infrastructure that continuously increases human capability while continuously decreasing unnecessary human burden.

constitutionalPrinciple: Technology should quietly expand human possibility while demanding as little human attention as possible.

rules.statement: If optimization conflicts with People Protection, People Protection is binding and optimization must be redesigned.
If work cannot demonstrate Life Capital improvement, it cannot be promoted.
AURORA execution and automation must operate inside this amendment's quiet-infrastructure and freedom objectives.
